title: The Lady from Hell
writer: J. Grubb Alexander (adaptation), J. Grubb Alexander (screenplay), John W. Krafft (titles), Norton S. Parker (story)
actors: Roy Stewart, Blanche Sweet, Ralph Lewis, Frank Elliott
plot: A former Scottish military officer is wrongly accused while living in the US of murder and is imprisoned. The person responsible for the crime confesses which allows the former officer to be released from prison.
